originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Fall: Trump Says No 'Rush' For Iran Deal
summary: President Donald Trump said an interim agreement is close that would open the Strait of Hormuz, but negotiations continue.
content: President Donald Trump said an interim agreement is close that would open the Strait of Hormuz, but negotiations continue.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货上涨，油价下跌：特朗普称不“急于”达成伊朗协议
chineseSummary: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，开放霍尔木兹海峡的临时协议已接近达成，但谈判仍在继续。
chineseContent: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，开放霍尔木兹海峡的临时协议已接近达成，但谈判仍在继续。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
